## Summary

Daily sentiment report for **TICKER** on **YYYY-MM-DD**.

## Checklist

- [ ] Report follows schema (`report.md` + `sources.json`)
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_report.py data/YYYY-MM-DD/TICKER/` passes
- [ ] Sentiment score is between -1.0 and +1.0 with cited rationale
- [ ] At least 3 real sources across 2+ types (twitter/reddit/news)
- [ ] No trading advice — sentiment collection only
- [ ] Commit message: `sentiment: TICKER YYYY-MM-DD`
